{{Quote|Right now we are planning to use our powerful Zukonium rays in the power stations. Instead of being used for war and destruction, Zukonium will provide energy for our colonies.|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
The '''Zukonium ray''' was a strong power source that could be used as a weapon.

==History==
{{Quote|Prepare to fire the Zukonium rays!|[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], to [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]|<ref name="TMM" />}}
The Zukonium ray was powerful enough to destroy a small [[Moon/Legends|moon]] but was primarily used as a strong power source for buildings and colonies. The [[Planetary Pioneers]] hoped to use Zukonium rays as a power source on numerous uninhabited worlds. However, [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was forced to use Zukonium rays to destroy a [[Unidentified maverick moon|maverick moon]] that was on a collision course with the [[Unidentified planet (New Academy for Space Pilots)|planet]] housing the [[New Academy for Space Pilots]].<ref name="TMM" />

==Appearances==
*''[[The Maverick Moon]]'' {{1st}}
